title: The Reason Why al-Khayzuran Had Ordered the Slave Girls to Kill al-Had!
description: the Slave Girls to Kill al-Had! Yabya b. al-Hasan172 has mentioned that when al-Hadi became Caliph, he became openly hostile towards and quarreled with his mother. Khalisah (i.e., al-Khayzuran's slave girl) came to him one day and told him, "Your mother seeks a gift of clothing from you," so he ordered a storehouse full of clothing to be given to her. He related: There were found in al-Khayzuran's house (after her death) among her possessions eighteen thousand sleeveless robes (gardgir1731 of figured silk.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
